projectName: SentinAI – Custom EVM Client Profile via JSON
description: Allow operators to add new EVM clients without code changes. Two parts: (1) backend loads client-profiles.json and merges with builtins, (2) Setup Wizard detects client via RPC probe and generates client-profiles.json in the install script.
qualityChecks: npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint && npm run test:run

userStories.title: custom-profiles loader: load and merge client-profiles.json
userStories.description: Create src/lib/client-profile/custom-profiles.ts. Export loadCustomProfiles(): CustomClientProfile[]. Reads CLIENT_PROFILES_PATH env (default: './client-profiles.json'). If file not found, returns []. Parses JSON array. Export getCustomProfile(family: string): CustomClientProfile | undefined. Export mergeWithBuiltins(builtins: Record<string, ClientProfile>): Record<string, ClientProfile> — merges custom profiles on top of builtins. CustomClientProfile interface: { clientFamily: string, detectPattern: string, methods: { txPool?: { method: string } | null, l2SyncStatus?: { method: string } | null }, capabilities: { supportsTxPool: boolean, supportsL2SyncStatus: boolean } }. Write unit tests in src/lib/__tests__/custom-profiles.test.ts using vitest — mock fs.readFileSync, test: file not found returns [], valid JSON merges correctly, custom profile overrides builtin.
acceptanceCriteria: loadCustomProfiles() returns [] when file not found
loadCustomProfiles() parses valid JSON array
mergeWithBuiltins() adds custom profiles to builtins map
mergeWithBuiltins() custom profile overrides builtin with same family name
npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm run test:run passes

userStories.title: client-detector: check custom profiles in normalizeExecutionFamily
userStories.description: Update src/lib/client-detector.ts normalizeExecutionFamily(version?: string): ExecutionClientFamily. After the existing hardcoded checks (geth/reth/nethermind/etc), add: call loadCustomProfiles(), iterate each profile, if version.toLowerCase().includes(profile.detectPattern.toLowerCase()) return profile.clientFamily as ExecutionClientFamily. Also update resolveClientProfile() in src/lib/client-profile/index.ts (or env-overrides.ts) to call mergeWithBuiltins(BUILTIN_PROFILES) so custom profiles are available for profile lookup. Update src/lib/__tests__/client-detector.test.ts to add test: when client-profiles.json has entry with detectPattern 'ethrex', detectExecutionClient returns family='ethrex'.
acceptanceCriteria: normalizeExecutionFamily('ethrex/1.0.0') returns 'ethrex' when custom profile with detectPattern='ethrex' exists
Falls back to 'unknown' when no custom profile matches
Does not break existing geth/reth/nethermind detection
npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm run test:run passes

userStories.title: POST /api/v2/client-detect endpoint
userStories.description: Create src/app/api/v2/client-detect/route.ts. POST handler accepts { rpcUrl: string }. Validates rpcUrl is non-empty string. Calls detectExecutionClient({ rpcUrl }). Returns { data: { family, txpoolNamespace, supportsL2SyncStatus, l2SyncMethod, clientVersion } } with 200. Returns { error: 'rpcUrl is required' } with 400 if missing. Returns { error: 'Detection failed', detail: message } with 500 on exception. Write route.test.ts covering: missing rpcUrl returns 400, successful detection returns 200 with all fields.
acceptanceCriteria: POST with empty body returns 400
POST with valid rpcUrl returns 200 with family, txpoolNamespace, supportsL2SyncStatus, l2SyncMethod, clientVersion
POST with unreachable rpcUrl returns 500 with error message
npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm run test:run passes

userStories.title: Setup Wizard: custom client section with auto-detect
userStories.description: Modify website/src/app/setup/page.tsx. When clientFamily === 'other', show a CustomClientSection below the main form card. Section has: (1) text input 'client name' (customName state), (2) '🔍 자동 감지' button that calls POST /api/v2/client-detect with the current rpcUrl, (3) shows detection result: txPool method, L2 sync support, detected version string. Detection result is stored in state (DetectResult: { family, txpoolNamespace, supportsL2SyncStatus, l2SyncMethod, clientVersion } | null). Button shows spinner while loading. Shows error message if detection fails. The detect button is disabled when rpcUrl is empty.
acceptanceCriteria: CustomClientSection appears only when clientFamily === 'other'
자동 감지 button is disabled when rpcUrl is empty
On success: shows txpoolNamespace, supportsL2SyncStatus, clientVersion
On error: shows error message
npx tsc --noEmit in website/ passes
npm run build in website/ passes

userStories.title: Setup Wizard: generate client-profiles.json in install script
userStories.description: Modify website/src/lib/generate-setup-script.ts and website/src/app/setup/page.tsx. Add CustomProfile interface to generate-setup-script.ts: { clientFamily: string, detectPattern: string, txPoolMethod: string | null, l2SyncMethod: string | null }. Update SetupConfig to include customProfile?: CustomProfile. Update generateSetupScript: when config.customProfile is defined, append to script: cat > client-profiles.json << 'SENTINAI_PROFILES_EOF' followed by the JSON content (single-element array), followed by SENTINAI_PROFILES_EOF. The customProfile.detectPattern should be sanitized with sanitizeForHeredoc. Pass DetectResult + customName from page.tsx into generateSetupScript via SetupConfig.customProfile. Only include customProfile in script when clientFamily === 'other' AND customName is non-empty AND detectResult is non-null.
acceptanceCriteria: generateSetupScript with customProfile produces client-profiles.json heredoc in script
generateSetupScript without customProfile produces no client-profiles.json section
detectPattern is sanitized (no newlines, no SENTINAI_PROFILES_EOF)
npx tsc --noEmit in website/ passes
npm run build in website/ passes
